content: User prefers dark mode in code editors and terminal themes.
User's cat Nori needs medication every Sunday evening.
Project Apollo release is scheduled for April 18 and requires a rollback checklist.
Travel planning notes say the user wants sushi recommendations near Shibuya in Tokyo.
ACME uses SAML single sign-on with Okta for employee access.
Tenant B prefers weekly summaries every Monday morning.
Incident 442 was caused by an expired Redis password in staging.
The user brews coffee with a Hario V60 every morning.
